PhaserAdvisories.Advisory: eLLG indicates that best placement of ensemble "Ensemble_1" will definitely be correct in the context of already correctly placed components eLLG indicates that best placement of ensemble "Ensemble_2" will definitely be correct in the context of already correctly placed components

PhaserMrResults.Summary:
********************************************************************************************* *** Phaser Module: AUTOMATED MOLECULAR REPLACEMENT 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
** Steps: ** Cell Content Analysis ** Anisotropy correction ** Translational NCS correction ** Rotation Function ** Translation Function ** Packing ** Refinement ** Final Refinement (if data higher resolution than search resolution) ** Number of search ensembles = 2 ** Search Method: FAST ** Input Search Order: ** #1 Ensemble_1 ** #2 Ensemble_2 ** Automatic (best predicted) search order WILL be used
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 0.33 secs ( 0.33 secs) Finished: Sun Jul 12 15:17:22 2020

****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: CELL CONTENT ANALYSIS 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Space-Group Name (Hall Symbol): P 32 2 1 ( P 32 2") Space-Group Number: 154 Unit Cell: 75.11 75.11 133.31 90.00 90.00 120.00
Composition is of type: PROTEIN MW to which Matthews applies: 48109 Resolution for Matthews calculation: 3.00
Z MW VM % solvent rel. freq. 1 48109 2.26 45.49 1.000 <== most probable
Z is the number of multiples of the total composition In most cases the most probable Z value should be 1 If it is not 1, you may need to consider other compositions
Most probable VM for resolution = 2.27165 Most probable MW of protein in asu for resolution = 47785.5
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 0.71 secs ( 0.71 secs) Finished: Sun Jul 12 15:17:22 2020

Resolution = 3.00366 Default RMSD = 0.1 0.2 0.4 0.8 1.6 3.2 Minimum solvent = 20% Maximum number of polyalanine residues = 555 (-full-) Alanine residues for eLLG target = 167
